calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Pltf To Respond To Interrogatories And Document Production Demand; And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-10-2011 Advanced From Dec-05-11 To Nov-10-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-10-2011 Vacated

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Pltf To Respond To Interrogatories And Document Production Demand; And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: S. Clinton Woods of Bradshaw & Associates, P.C. (415-433-4800) for Yerba Buena Commons Association Inc., Plaintiff and moving party
No other appearances

Matter advanced from DEC-05-2011 - No Tentative Ruling - No opposition filed.

Plaintiff Yerba Buena Commons Association Inc.'s Motion to Compell Defendant To Respond To Interrogatories And Document Production Demand is granted. Plaintiff awarded sanctions in the amountof $1,502.50 to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Not Reported

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Yerba Buena Gardens is present. Represented by Mitchell Brown.
Attorney S. Clinton Woods appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Joy Burrell is present.
Attorney Hope Greenhill representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Guy Stilson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated.
